'''ngafuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leadpipe|leadpipe]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-f-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leadpipe|leadpipe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngafuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæfijith|ngæfijith]] || [[word:ngæfijij|ngæfijij]] || [[word:ngæfijish|ngæfijish]] || [[word:ngæfiji|ngæfiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngafufujuth|ngafufujuth]] || [[word:ngafufujuj|ngafufujuj]] || [[word:ngafufujush|ngafufujush]] || [[word:ngafufuju|ngafufuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngafujuth|ngafujuth]] || [[word:ngafujuj|ngafujuj]] || [[word:ngafujush|ngafujush]] || [[word:ngafuju|ngafuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngafufjuth|ngafufjuth]] || [[word:ngafufjuj|ngafufjuj]] || [[word:ngafufjush|ngafufjush]] || [[word:ngafufjuf|ngafufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngafujuthu|ngafujuthu]] || [[word:ngafujuju|ngafujuju]] || [[word:ngafujushu|ngafujushu]] || [[word:ngafujuku|ngafujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngafujuth|ngafujuth]] || [[word:ngafujuj|ngafujuj]] || [[word:ngafujush|ngafujush]] || [[word:ngafuju|ngafuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngafujuthul|ngafujuthul]] || [[word:ngafujujul|ngafujujul]] || [[word:ngafujushul|ngafujushul]] || [[word:ngafujukul|ngafujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngafujuthuthu|ngafujuthuthu]] || [[word:ngafujujuju|ngafujujuju]] || [[word:ngafujushushu|ngafujushushu]] || [[word:ngafujuku|ngafujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngafujuthun|ngafujuthun]] || [[word:ngafujujun|ngafujujun]] || [[word:ngafujushun|ngafujushun]] || [[word:ngafujukun|ngafujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngafujuthuoro|ngafujuthuoro]] || [[word:ngafujujuoro|ngafujujuoro]] || [[word:ngafujushuoro|ngafujushuoro]] || [[word:ngafujukuoro|ngafujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
